Container.Name: it-tools
Container.Overview:
This is a fork of the original it-tools because it appears to be no longer maintained.
A reverse proxy is recommended because some tools rely on HTTPS (WebCrypto API).
Added features: - Almost all tools PR, 192 of mine, of original it-tools - 95% of issues if original it-tools - Full UI translation in many language (Google Translated) - Many new tools - Many bug fixes and enhancements - Many customizations (Docker version), see below
Filter tools and add home custom content(https://github.com/sharevb/it-tools#filter-tools-and-add-home-custom-content)
Add custom external tools(https://github.com/sharevb/it-tools#add-custom-external-tools)
Setting default tools parameters / default UI language at runtime(https://github.com/sharevb/it-tools#setting-default-tools-parameters--default-ui-language-at-runtime)
<3 Consider supporting the developer(https://github.com/sharevb/it-tools#pr-welcome)

Config.Name: Customizations
Config.Description: directory for custom content and modifying default settings (more info: links in the overview or click on the project page)<br>*you can remove this mount if you only want the defaults*
